title: King Olly Resource Pack
description: It's a resource pack that turns the allay into King Olly
body:
King Olly folds into Minecraft with this resource pack! though it's incompatible with mods, so if your a modder this pack is not for you! 🎮
-  What this Resource Pack Did:
-  Reskins the Allay into King Olly,
That's it that's all the resource pack does.
[I know, it's lame]
